mapper.select: SELECT lr.id, lr.title, lr.type, lr.category, lr.difficulty, lr.duration, lr.url, lr.thumbnail_url, lr.description, lr.view_count, lr.status, lr.created_at, lr.updated_at FROM learning_resources lr JOIN learning_path_resources lpr ON lpr.resource_id = lr.id WHERE lpr.path_id = #{pathId} ORDER BY lpr.sort_order ASC
